---
title: People
---


## Staff

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="33%"}
![](../media/people/muncy.jpg){width=80%}

::: {style="text-align: left;"}
| Nathan Muncy, Ph.D.
| MRI Analyst
| E: [nmuncy@nd.edu](mailto:nmuncy@nd.edu)
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}
![](../media/nd_monogram_gold.jpg){width=65%}

::: {style="text-align: left;"}
| Alex Musser, M.Sc.
| Operations Coordinator
| E: [amusser2@nd.edu](mailto:amusser2@nd.edu)
:::
::::
:::::

<!-- ![John Doe, Ph.D.](../media/people/minion.jpg){width=100, fig-align="left"}

**Position**: MRI Physicist -->


<!-- ![Nathan Muncy, Ph.D.](../media/people/muncy.jpg){width=30% fig-align="left"}

MRI Analyst | [nmuncy@nd.edu](mailto:nmuncy@nd.edu) | B28 Veldman Family Psychology Clinic -->

<!-- ![John Doe](../media/people/minion.jpg){width=100, fig-align="left"}

**Position**: MRI Technologist -->

<!--
![Alex Musser](../media/people/minion.jpg){width=100, fig-align="left"}

**Position**: Operations Coordinator -->
